font-semibold text-slate-900 dark:text-white","children":"What's new in Nx 15?"}]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"mx-auto mb-16 w-full max-w-screen-md","children":["$","$Lc",null,{"className":"w-full xl:grid-cols-[200px_minmax(0,1fr)_200px]","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"hidden min-h-full xl:block","children":"$undefined"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"w-full min-w-0 md:mx-auto md:max-w-screen-md","children":["$undefined",["$","div",null,{"data-document":"main","className":"prose prose-lg prose-slate dark:prose-invert w-full max-w-none","children":["$","article",null,{"children":[["$","p",null,{"children":"Nx v15 is finally here! Let's go through all the great features that went into this major release."}],["$","$Ld",null,{"maxDepth":3}],["$","h2",null,{"id":"growing-fast","className":"group scroll-mt-20","children":["Growing fast!",["$","$Lb",null,{"aria-hidden":"true","href":"#growing-fast","children":["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","fill":"none","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","strokeWidth":1.5,"stroke":"currentColor","aria-hidden":"true","data-slot":"icon","aria-labelledby":"$undefined","className":"mb-1 ml-2 inline h-5 w-5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100","children":[null,["$","path",null,{"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","d":"M13.19 8.688a4.5 4.5 0 0 1 1.242 7.244l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 1-6.364-6.364l1.757-1.757m13.35-.622 1.757-1.757a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-6.364-6.364l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 1.242 7.244"}]]}]}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Nx is currently at ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"~2.7 million NPM downloads per week"}],", which is incredible given we just crossed the 1 million downloads/week at the beginning of this year."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["$","img",null,{"src":"/documentation/blog/images/2022-10-14/SfKdIa3JKTG7F-tg.avif","alt":"","loading":"lazy"}]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Expect it to see growing much faster even in the coming months."}],["$","h2",null,{"id":"performance-core-nx-daemon","className":"group scroll-mt-20","children":["Performance — Core, Nx Daemon",["$","$Lb",null,{"aria-hidden":"true","href":"#performance-core-nx-daemon","children":["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","fill":"none","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","strokeWidth":1.5,"stroke":"currentColor","aria-hidden":"true","data-slot":"icon","aria-labelledby":"$undefined","className":"mb-1 ml-2 inline h-5 w-5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100","children":[null,["$","path",null,{"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","d":"M13.19 8.688a4.5 4.5 0 0 1 1.242 7.244l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 1-6.364-6.364l1.757-1.757m13.35-.622 1.757-1.757a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-6.364-6.364l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 1.242 7.244"}]]}]}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Performance optimizations are a recurring theme for us. We're continuously optimizing Nx to make it even faster than it is now."}],["$","p",null,{"children":"For example, when a cache hit needs to restore artifacts to some \"dist\" folder, we don't touch the file system if it is not needed (because FS operations are costly). As a result, this would also not mess with any \"watch\" process on your dist folder, which you might use. And obviously, we detect whenever a file is missing. If you delete a single file from your \"dist\" folder, Nx will know and restore it properly."}],["$","p",null,{"children":"This is possible because we offload some of the computation to a daemon process. This runs in the background to compute heavy operations like ensuring the project graph is always in sync, watching cache output locations and more."}],["$","p",null,{"children":["You can read more about it here: ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/concepts/nx-daemon","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"/concepts/nx-daemon","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]]}],["$","h2",null,{"id":"packagebased-and-integrated-style-monorepos","className":"group scroll-mt-20","children":["Package-based and Integrated Style Monorepos",["$","$Lb",null,{"aria-hidden":"true","href":"#packagebased-and-integrated-style-monorepos","children":["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","fill":"none","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","strokeWidth":1.5,"stroke":"currentColor","aria-hidden":"true","data-slot":"icon","aria-labelledby":"$undefined","className":"mb-1 ml-2 inline h-5 w-5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100","children":[null,["$","path",null,{"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","d":"M13.19 8.688a4.5 4.5 0 0 1 1.242 7.244l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 1-6.364-6.364l1.757-1.757m13.35-.622 1.757-1.757a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-6.364-6.364l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 1.242 7.244"}]]}]}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"In our 5 years of working with small and huge monorepos we've seen various setups. We've narrowed them down to two approaches:"}],["$","ul",null,{"children":[["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"package-based monorepos"}]," — a collection of packages where each package within the monorepo is treated as a fully independent package. Meaning they have their own ",["$","code",null,{"children":"package.json"}]," with dependencies declared. To share and link packages locally within the monorepo, the \"workspaces\" feature from NPM/Yarn/PNPM can be used. Tools for this style are Nx, Lerna, Lage and Turbo."]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"integrated monorepos"}]," — is usually a pre-configured and managed setup. You don't have to rely on NPM/Yarn/PNPM workspaces for local linking and tooling helps with the low-level tooling setup and integrating various tools. Tools for this style are Nx and Bazel."]}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"We improved and optimized Nx to be the best solution for both approaches. As part of this optimization, starting with Nx v15, when you run"}],["$","$Le",null,{"language":"shell","fileName":"","highlightLines":[],"lineGroups":{},"command":"","title":"","path":"","skipRescope":false,"enableCopy":true,"lineWrap":0,"children":"npx create-nx-workspace\n"}],["$","p",null,{"children":"...you will now get a new question about whether you want to create a package-based monorepo or integrated style monorepo."}],["$","p",null,{"children":["$","img",null,{"src":"/documentation/blog/images/2022-10-14/CImYERzLu-0nlydk.avif","alt":"","loading":"lazy"}]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"There will be more content around choosing which style and even how to mix the two. Go with what works best for you and your current situation, and Nx will be there to handle the rest."}],["$","p",null,{"children":"We also updated our docs to have two super short tutorials that illustrate the two approaches:"}],["$","ul",null,{"children":[["$","li",null,{"children":["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/getting-started/tutorials/typescript-packages-tutorial","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"/getting-started/tutorials/typescript-packages-tutorial","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]}],["$","li",null,{"children":["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/getting-started/tutorials/react-monorepo-tutorial","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"/getting-started/tutorials/react-monorepo-tutorial","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["You can also read more about the concept here: ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/deprecated/integrated-vs-package-based","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"/deprecated/integrated-vs-package-based","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]]}],["$","h2",null,{"id":"new-compact-syntax-for-task-pipelines","className":"group scroll-mt-20","children":["New Compact Syntax for Task Pipelines",["$","$Lb",null,{"aria-hidden":"true","href":"#new-compact-syntax-for-task-pipelines","children":["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","fill":"none","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","strokeWidth":1.5,"stroke":"currentColor","aria-hidden":"true","data-slot":"icon","aria-labelledby":"$undefined","className":"mb-1 ml-2 inline h-5 w-5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100","children":[null,["$","path",null,{"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","d":"M13.19 8.688a4.5 4.5 0 0 1 1.242 7.244l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 1-6.364-6.364l1.757-1.757m13.35-.622 1.757-1.757a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-6.364-6.364l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 1.242 7.244"}]]}]}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Monorepos typically do not just have dependencies among projects but also among tasks. Let's say you have a Remix app that depends on some ",["$","code",null,{"children":"shared-ui"}]," React-based library. Whenever you build or serve your app, ",["$","code",null,{"children":"shared-ui"}]," gets built before. This is required - especially in a package-based monorepo - because connected packages depend on the build artifacts, that is the compiled JS files."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["You can define such a relationship easily in the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"nx.json"}]," by specifying the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"targetDefaults"}]," property. Nx had this for a while, but as part of some v14 minor version, we made it more concise."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Here's an example:"}],["$","$Le",null,{"language":"json","fileName":"nx.json","highlightLines":[],"lineGroups":{},"command":"","title":"","path":"","skipRescope":false,"enableCopy":true,"lineWrap":0,"children":"{\n  \"targetDefaults\": {\n    // run the build of all dependent packages first\n    \"build\": {\n      \"dependsOn\": [\"^build\"]\n    },\n    \"dev\": {\n      \"dependsOn\": [\"^build\"]\n    },\n    // run a package's build task before running publish\n    \"publish\": {\n      \"dependsOn\": [\"build\"]\n    }\n  }\n}\n"}],["$","p",null,{"children":["You can read more here: ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/concepts/task-pipeline-configuration","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"/concepts/task-pipeline-configuration","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]]}],["$","h2",null,{"id":"finetune-caching-with-inputs","className":"group scroll-mt-20","children":["Fine-tune Caching with Inputs",["$","$Lb",null,{"aria-hidden":"true","href":"#finetune-caching-with-inputs","children":["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","fill":"none","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","strokeWidth":1.5,"stroke":"currentColor","aria-hidden":"true","data-slot":"icon","aria-labelledby":"$undefined","className":"mb-1 ml-2 inline h-5 w-5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100","children":[null,["$","path",null,{"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","d":"M13.19 8.688a4.5 4.5 0 0 1 1.242 7.244l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 1-6.364-6.364l1.757-1.757m13.35-.622 1.757-1.757a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-6.364-6.364l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 1.242 7.244"}]]}]}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Nx's caching is already powerful, but you can get even more out of it by fine-tuning it to your workspace's needs. This is done by defining ",["$","code",null,{"children":"inputs"}]," in ",["$","code",null,{"children":"nx.json"}]," for the various targets."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Here, for instance, we define that the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"build"}]," target should include all the files of a given project but not include test-related files. As a result, changing a Jest spec won't invalidate your ",["$","code",null,{"children":"build"}]," target cache."]}],["$","$Le",null,{"language":"json","fileName":"nx.json","highlightLines":[],"lineGroups":{},"command":"","title":"","path":"","skipRescope":false,"enableCopy":true,"lineWrap":0,"children":"{\n  ...\n  \"targetDefaults\": {\n    \"build\": {\n      ...\n      \"inputs\": [\n          \"{projectRoot}/**/*\",\n          \"!{projectRoot}/**/?(*.)+(spec|test).[jt]s?(x)?(.snap)\"\n       ]\n    }\n  }\n}\n"}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Since these inputs are often re-used across different targets, they can be defined in a dedicated ",["$","code",null,{"children":"namedInputs"}]," property (think like a variable declaration) and re-used in the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"targetDefaults"}],"."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Here's an example of the defaults that a new Nx workspace comes with:"}],["$","$Le",null,{"language":"json","fileName":"nx.json","highlightLines":[],"lineGroups":{},"command":"","title":"","path":"","skipRescope":false,"enableCopy":true,"lineWrap":0,"children":"{\n  ...\n  \"namedInputs\": {\n    \"default\": [\"{projectRoot}/**/*\", \"sharedGlobals\"],\n    \"production\": [\n      \"default\",\n      \"!{projectRoot}/.eslintrc.json\",\n      \"!{projectRoot}/**/?(*.)+(spec|test).[jt]s?(x)?(.snap)\",\n      \"!{projectRoot}/tsconfig.spec.json\",\n      \"!{projectRoot}/jest.config.[jt]s\"\n    ],\n    \"sharedGlobals\": []\n  },\n  \"targetDefaults\": {\n    \"build\": {\n      \"dependsOn\": [\"^build\"],\n      \"inputs\": [\"production\", \"^production\"]\n    },\n    \"lint\": {\n      \"inputs\": [\"default\", \"{workspaceRoot}/.eslintrc.json\"]\n    },\n    \"test\": {\n      \"inputs\": [\n        \"default\",\n        \"^production\",\n        \"{workspaceRoot}/jest.preset.js\"\n      ]\n    }\n  }\n}\n"}],["$","p",null,{"children":["You can read more here: ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/recipes/running-tasks/configure-inputs","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"/recipes/running-tasks/configure-inputs","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]]}],["$","h2",null,{"id":"nx-console","className":"group scroll-mt-20","children":["Nx Console",["$","$Lb",null,{"aria-hidden":"true","href":"#nx-console","children":["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","fill":"none","viewBox":"0 0 24 mission to improve the life of developers when working with Nx (and now also Lerna) monorepos. There have been tremendous improvements over the last couple of months. Here are some highlights!"}],["$","p",null,{"children":["The famous, so much loved ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/features/explore-graph","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"Nx Graph","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," can now also be visualized within VSCode directly:"]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["$","img",null,{"src":"/documentation/blog/images/2022-10-14/92hOex9StyREA608.avif","alt":"","loading":"lazy"}]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Get a more in-depth walkthrough here:"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-center","children":[" ",["$","iframe",null,{"src":"https://www.youtube.com/embed/ZST_rmhzRXI","title":"$undefined","width":"100%","allow":"accelerometer; come."}],["$","h2",null,{"id":"cleanup-for-pure-jsts-packages-and-esbuild-support","className":"group scroll-mt-20","children":["Cleanup for pure JS/TS packages and ESBuild support!",["$","$Lb",null,{"aria-hidden":"true","href":"#cleanup-for-pure-jsts-packages-and-esbuild-support","children":["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","fill":"none","viewBox":"0
